summary: Completed testing of TrustLens Conversation Coach feature. Backend: All 5 tones and 5 topics work correctly via POST /api/analysis/conversation-coach. Response structure verified: framing (approach, tone_guidance, timing_suggestion), openings (2-3 items), questions (3-5 items), avoid (3-4 items), emotional_preparation (before/during/if_difficult), observe (2-3 items). Frontend: /coach page loads with input view showing 4 tone options and 5 topic options with correct data-testids. Guidance view code has all required sections with proper data-testid attributes.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/analysis/conversation-coach returns 200 with valid session

Backend: Response has 'openings' array with 2-3 suggested opening lines
Backend: Response has 'questions' array with 3-5 thoughtful questions
Backend: Response has 'avoid' array with 3-4 things to avoid
Backend: Response has 'emotional_preparation' object with before/during/if_difficult
Backend: Response has 'observe' array with 2-3 observation points
Backend: All 4 tones work (gentle, direct, curious, supportive)
Backend: All 5 topics work (recent_changes, feelings, communication, future, trust)

Frontend: Input view shows 5 topic options with data-testid=topic-{recent_changes/feelings/communication/future/trust}

critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py lines 434-596: generate_conversation_guidance() correctly builds rich prompt with session context (suspicion score, signals, baseline, timeline, mirror data)
Backend: Rich fallback content provided when LLM fails - includes signal-specific questions based on changes_data
Backend: All required response fields populated with meaningful content
Frontend ConversationCoach.jsx: Clean separation of input view (lines 260-376) and guidance view (lines 94-258)
Frontend: Proper error handling - redirects to home if no sessionId present
